landing.headline: UI ab banao, backend baad me jodo.
landing.description: Yeh frontend strict API contracts aur mock adapter ke saath bana hai, isliye hackathon me speed aur stability dono milti hai.
landing.pointOne: Brand tokens, spacing aur breakpoints centrally managed hain.
landing.pointTwo: Mock data backend contracts ke format ko follow karta hai.
landing.pointThree: Language switch i18next ke saath persist hota hai.
landing.pointFour: Left controls aur right table judge demo ke liye optimized hain.

auth.title: Judge Demo Access
auth.subtitle: Module 1 flow start karne ke liye koi bhi username/password use karo.
auth.required: Username aur password dono zaruri hain.

dashboard.historyEmpty: History ke liye pehle ek analysis chalao.
dashboard.latestEmpty: Abhi koi analysis select nahi hai.
dashboard.uploadHint: Yeh step contracts based mock data use karta hai jisse UI stable rahe.

settings.title: Profile and Foundation
settings.languageSaved: Preferred language adapter state me update ho gaya.
